```
---
ApplyTo: **/*.ts, **/*.js
Description: This file describes the environment variable configuration for the frontend project, including how to set up and verify the backend server URL.
---

```

## What to avoid

- Never write document per each task asked to work on unless explicitly asked. 

- Don't hardcode backend URLs in your code. Use environment variables to configure the API server URL for development and production.

- All imports should be at the top of the file, and you should avoid importing modules inside functions or blocks of code.
